CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ts TIMESTAMP, dt DATE);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-12-31 18:00:00', date '2021-12-31');
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp ts, interval '2' month) FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp '2023-01-31 15:00:00', interval '1' day) AS new_timestamp;
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp '2023-03-01 00:00:00', interval '1' month) AS new_timestamp;
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp '2020-01-29 12:00:00', interval '1' month) AS new_timestamp;
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp '2021-12-31 23:59:59', interval '1' second) AS new_timestamp;
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp '2020-01-01 00:00:00', interval '-1' month) AS new_timestamp;
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp '2023-03-31 10:00:00', interval '30' day) AS new_timestamp;
CREATE TABLE other_timestamps (id INT PRIMARY KEY, other_ts TIMESTAMP);
SELECT tt.id, timestampadd(tt.ts, interval '4' month) FROM test_timestamps tt JOIN other_timestamps ot ON tt.id = ot.id;
SELECT timestampadd((SELECT ts FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1), interval '3' day) AS derived_timestamp;
SELECT tt.id, ot.other_ts, timestampadd(ot.other_ts, interval '1' month) FROM test_timestamps tt JOIN other_timestamps ot ON tt.id = 1;
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp '2021-06-15 18:00:00', interval '0' month) AS same_timestamp;
SELECT timestampadd(timestamp '2023-05-31 23:59:59', interval '1' day) AS new_timestamp;
